full_text:
Fu Xie (Nanrong) 傅燮 (南容)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Xie (傅燮), styledNanrong (南容), was born in Beidi. Loyal minister who fought against the Turbans with Zhu Jun. Fu Xie was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Fu Xie lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
